programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy searches for monsters in the Indian River Lagoon and the Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: Texas Gator Savers
programme.desc: Gary, Shannon, Callie, and Damon try to corral a 10-foot alligator in a muddy mess. S01 E03.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: See some of wildlife's most remarkable moments, caught on film by amateurs and professionals.

programme.desc: Elephant's sensitivity and social ties are the basis of elephant survival.

programme.title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
programme.desc: The leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.

programme.desc: Navigate a mangrove forest in Borneo with the saltwater crocodile.

programme.title: Brotherhood of Lions
programme.desc: Family ties become complicated as the cubs compete with each other while hunting their prey.

programme.desc: Celebrate the success of Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: The elephants dig wells as the rain pours; a group of lions kill one of cheetah Kuleta's cubs.

programme.desc: Take a trip to Africa; curious minds get to observe the lives of lions, crocodiles and cheetahs.

programme.desc: Takes a look at intricate, trap-like structures that animals build to capture prey.
